ChangeRequest.name: AE Requirements - Assign a role to securities (asset, liabilities, collateral etc.)
ChangeRequest.comment:
# Overview
In Asset Encumbrance we need the possibility to assign different roles to securities (asset, liabilities, collateral etc.). The differentiation between asset and liabilities is already there for derivatives.
Differently from FINREP, the accounting classification isn't required in AE and therefore we can't use it to make the distinction between asset and liabilities.
We might derive this information using the accounting classification and the relationship between other part of the model (e.g., the link with the collateral).
### Contact person
@Maria_Manuel.Henriques @Pietro.Ferroni @Arianna.Nuvoli

_\[Business requirements\]_

### Reason for inclusion
AE integration
